stories.headline: OpenAI robotics hardware leader resigns over Pentagon AI partnership concerns.
stories.teaser: Caitlin Kalinowski quit March 7 citing inadequate guardrails for Pentagon deal — per TechCrunch

stories.headline: Pentagon reports seventh US service member killed in Middle East Iran war.
stories.teaser: Army soldier died from injuries in Iranian attack on Saudi Arabia — Fortune March 8

stories.headline: Iran names Ayatollah Khamenei's son Mojtaba as new supreme leader after father's death.
stories.teaser: Assembly of Experts chose Mojtaba Khamenei, 56, as third supreme leader — Iranian state TV

stories.headline: Oil surges past $100 for first time since 2022 as Iran war escalates.
stories.teaser: Brent crude hit $114.30, up 23.38% while WTI rose 26.35% to $114.85 — CNBC March 9

stories.headline: Google awards CEO Sundar Pichai $692 million pay package tied to performance metrics.
stories.teaser: Package mostly performance-based with stock incentives linked to Waymo, Wing — TechCrunch

stories.headline: Oil soars toward $120 as Iran war forces major Middle East production cuts.
stories.teaser: Major producers curbed output with Strait of Hormuz remaining closed — Bloomberg March 8

stories.headline: FBI investigates breach potentially affecting wiretapping and surveillance systems.
stories.teaser: Federal bureau probing compromise of systems related to surveillance tools — The Register

stories.headline: Scientists discover balanced atom breaking nuclear physics rules in molybdenum-84.
stories.teaser: Molybdenum-84 shows deformed structure despite equal protons and neutrons — Science Daily March 8

stories.headline: Emirates resumes Dubai flights after Middle East air travel disruption strands Britons.
stories.teaser: New UK flights follow days of widespread regional aviation disruption — BBC March 7
